about.age_requirement: Users must be 18+ years old to use this service.
about.api_desc: Vidveil provides REST, GraphQL, and OpenAPI documentation:
about.description: Vidveil 是一个尊重隐私的成人视频元搜索引擎。
about.feature_engines: 49 search engines across major adult video sites
about.feature_parallel: Fast parallel search across all engines
about.feature_privacy: No tracking, no cookies, no logs
about.feature_thumbnails: Video thumbnails, duration, and view counts
about.feature_tor: Full Tor support for anonymous searching
about.legal_desc: Vidveil is a meta search engine that aggregates publicly available content from third-party websites. We do not host any content. All search results link directly to their original sources.
about.selfhost_desc: Vidveil is distributed as a single static binary with embedded assets:
about.title: 关于 Vidveil
admin.session_expired: 会话已过期，请重新登录
age.question: 您是否已满18周岁？
age.title: 需要年龄验证
age.warning: 本网站包含成人内容。您必须年满18周岁才能进入。
app.description: 无追踪地跨多个成人视频网站搜索
app.name: Vidveil
app.tagline: 尊重隐私的成人视频元搜索
error.rate_limited: 请求过于频繁，请稍后再试
favorites.confirm_clear: Remove all favorites? This cannot be undone.
favorites.empty_hint: Use the ⋮ menu on any video to add it here.
favorites.nojs: Favorites are stored locally in your browser. JavaScript is required to display them.
favorites.title: Favorites
prefs.default_filters_desc: These filters will be applied automatically to new searches:
prefs.engines_desc: Toggle tiers on/off or select individual engines:
prefs.preview_only_hint: Videos with video preview capability appear first, followed by all other results.
prefs.quality_hint: Videos without quality info will pass this filter.
prefs.show_synthetic_hint: Disabled by default. Synthetic videos are filtered out for authenticity.
prefs.title: 偏好设置
prefs.use_tor: Use Tor for all searches (requires Tor running)
privacy.commitment_desc: Vidveil is built with privacy as its core principle. We believe your search activity is your business, not ours.
privacy.no_accounts: No user accounts or registration required
privacy.no_search_logs: Search queries are not logged or stored
privacy.open_source_desc: Vidveil is open source. You can audit the code yourself to verify our privacy claims.
privacy.selfhost_desc: For complete control over your privacy, you can self-host Vidveil. The application is distributed as a single binary with no external dependencies, making it easy to run on your own server.
privacy.store_desc: The only data stored is your preferences (theme, enabled engines), which are saved locally in your browser using localStorage. This data never leaves your device.
privacy.summary: 我们不追踪您。我们不存储您的搜索记录。我们不使用 Cookie 进行追踪。
privacy.third_party_desc: When you click on a search result, you will be redirected to the original video site. Those third-party sites have their own privacy policies and may collect data about you. We recommend using a VPN or Tor for additional privacy.
privacy.title: 隐私政策
privacy.tor_desc: Vidveil fully supports Tor routing for maximum anonymity. When enabled, all search requests to video sites are routed through the Tor network, hiding your IP address from those sites.
